subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-14
subcodes.first_line: The view from the Pilgrims Home is very attractive.... In the future the distance between Akka and Haifa will be built up, and the two cities will join and clasp hands
subcodes.subjects: @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @prophecy and fulfillment, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Shrines and Holy places
